data.title: Eightco (NASDAQ: ORBS) Secures $125M in Institutional Commitments Led by Bitmine (NYSE: BMNR), Cathie Wood's ARK Invest, and Payward to Expand into Next Generation Technology
data.description: ORBS has recently announced significant investments in renowned companies such as OpenAI and Beast Industries. Tom Lee, Chairman of Bitmine (NYSE: BMNR), has joined the board of directors to back ORBS' lasting investment strategy. Additionally, leading investment firm ARK Invest has partnered with ORBS to offer strategic advisory services. These high-profile collaborations mark a defining moment for ORBS as it seeks to expand its presence in the market.

data.title: Senegal Joint Investigation Confirms Softcare's Product Quality and Compliance
data.description: In Senegal, the Ministry of Health held a press briefing on March 12, 2026, concerning a collaborative investigation with Softcare SN. This joint effort in Dakar revealed crucial findings. The inquiry involved multiple parties from Nairobi, Kenya, and Accra, Ghana. The investigation's detailed report disclosed significant statistics and insights to the public, shedding light on essential health matters.
Orchestra BioMed Reports Full Year 2025 Financial Results and Provides Fourth Quarter Business Update

data.title: SecureIQLab WAAP 5.0 First to Test AI-Powered Defenses with AI-Powered Attacks
data.description: The release of Version 5.0 introduces several key features to enhance security measures in the cyber risk domain. These include the addition of LLM security, AI-assisted bot attacks, and API gateway validation. These new features have expanded the independent evaluation of WAAP to now encompass 7 test categories and introduce 3 new attack surfaces. This update was announced from Austin, Texas, on March 12, 2026, by SecureIQLab.

data.title: New Audit by The Phia Group Flags Provider Billing Strategies Driving Employer Plan Waste Under the No Surprises Act (NSA)
data.description: A recent in-depth analysis conducted on a state-by-state basis has uncovered how arbitration practices by the NSA are contributing to a rise in expenses for employer-provided health plans. The study, released by The Phia Group, a prominent company specializing in healthcare cost management, unveiled that these dynamics are leading to increased costs for such plans across the nation. The report, issued on March 12, 2026, sheds light on the growing financial burdens facing employer-sponsored health plans due to NSA arbitration activities. This analysis provides valuable insights into the healthcare landscape, highlighting the impact on employers and individuals.

data.title: Einride to Host Analyst and Investor Day on March 19 as Company Advances Toward U.S. Public Market Listing
data.description: On March 12, 2026, in Stockholm, Einride AB, a tech company leading the shift to cost-effective electric and autonomous freight services for major global shippers, is set to hold a presentation for analysts and investors. This move signals Einride's commitment to showcasing its innovative solutions and engaging with key stakeholders.

data.title: South Korea aims to utilize AI for tracking crypto taxes. National Tax Service seeks bids for analyzing trading data to catch tax evasion.
data.description: The National Tax Service is inviting bids for the procurement of a platform that will be used to analyze data related to cryptocurrency trading. The purpose of this platform is to identify and flag potential instances of tax evasion. This initiative aims to enhance the monitoring and enforcement of tax regulations in the crypto market. Interested parties can submit their bids to provide this platform to the National Tax Service. The system will play a crucial role in analyzing a significant amount of trading data to ensure compliance and combat tax evasion effectively.

data.title: Core AI Holdings and Optimus Tech Launch OptiCore Datacenters to Power AI Research at R1 Universities
data.description: Collaborative effort established to provide state-controlled data center infrastructure to bolster cutting-edge AI and machine learning capabilities within top-tier research facilities.

data.title: Accrete AI and Ocient Announce Partnership Empowering National Security Customers To Turn Massive Data into Action
data.description: On March 12, 2026, a dual-use AI company called Accrete, Inc. established in 2017, known for its Knowledge Engine Platform that integrates institutional knowledge and expertise into AI agents for enhanced decision-making, revealed a key collaboration with Ocient, a company driven by AI technology.

data.title: Asylon Robotics Announces New Advisors, Additions to Leadership Team
data.description: Philadelphia-based company Asylon, known for their automated robotic security solutions, has appointed Anthony McCarty as Senior Vice President Government to oversee the expansion of their military security services. They have also welcomed Michael W. Wanik, a well-respected corporate security expert, to their advisory team. Asylon aims to revolutionize traditional security methods with drones, aiming to eliminate outdated, labor-intensive, and expensive security protocols.

data.title: UK Fintech Legado Nears 500,000 Users as Financial Services Sector Rushes to Adopt More Digital Infrastructure
data.description: In Edinburgh, Scotland, the UK fintech company Legado has experienced significant growth in its customer base, with a triple-digit increase over the past year, bringing the total to nearly half a million users. This growth comes as the financial services industry increasingly adopts digital infrastructure. Legado provides support to financial institutions by assisting in the modernization of customer communications and document management through its technology platform. Some of Legado's clients include FNZ, Quilter, Scottish Building Society, Moneyhub, and Co-op Legal Services.

data.title: ESAB Corporation Announces Offering of Senior Notes
data.description: ESAB Corporation, based in North Bethesda, Maryland, has recently disclosed the offering of senior notes. The company, known for its expertise in providing welding and cutting solutions, has yet to announce the specific amount or terms of the offering. This move will allow ESAB to raise funds for various corporate activities, potentially including expansion, research and development, or debt repayment. The offering of senior notes signifies a strategic financial decision by ESAB to leverage external financing for their operations.

data.title: Zebra Technologies’ PartnerConnect Program Earns Top Rating in 2026 CRN® Partner Program Guide
data.description: Zebra Technologies Corporation, a leading company in digitizing and automating workflows, has received a notable achievement in 2026. The company, listed on NASDAQ as ZBRA, was honored with a 5-star rating in the Partner Program Guide by CRN®, under The Channel Company. This recognition is significant for Zebra as it showcases excellence in its partnership program. CRN's guide is a valuable resource for various service providers, aiding them in selecting suitable strategies for their operations. Zebra's acknowledgment in this guide highlights its commitment to providing top-tier solutions and services.
FOREIGN MINISTER SAYS TURKEY AGAINST PLANS AIMED AT INCITING CIVIL WAR IN IRAN AND TRIGGERING CONFLICTS ALONG ETHNIC AND RELIGIOUS FAULT LINES.
Shell plc submits Form 20-F to SEC for regulatory compliance.

data.title: TXOne Networks Showcases TXOne Complete at S4x26, Advancing the Full OT Security Journey for Channel Partners
data.description: A company specializing in operational technology (OT) security has launched a comprehensive framework in Irving, Texas on March 12, 2026. This framework guides channel partners and clients through various stages, starting from discovery to active protection. TXOne Networks, the provider, is focused on enhancing capabilities to better serve their customers.

data.title: 'Nahda Capital Partners' files for registration of inaugural private equity fund in ADGM
data.description: In an effort to emphasize its commitment to fostering long-lasting partnerships and aiding in the growth of the local economy, a company based in Dubai has selected a name that mirrors its enduring mission. The firm, situated in UAE, disclosed that it aims to play a significant role in advancing the region's real economy by offering support to indigenous entrepreneurs, families, and establishments. With a specific emphasis on assisting local founders and institutions, the company named Nahda is determined to contribute positively to the community. The announcement was made on March 12, 2026.

data.title: S&P Global Ratings Forecasts Global Sustainable Bond Market Will Consolidate In 2026 with Issuance Levels at $800-900 billion
data.description: The issuance of global sustainable bonds is expected to stabilize around $800 billion to $900 billion by 2026, indicating a transition from rapid expansion to market stabilization. Regional patterns vary, with Europe maintaining its position as the primary market while the U.S. experiences a decline in issuance. In contrast, issuance in the Asia-Pacific, Latin America, and the Middle East shows differing trends.

data.title: THORNE BECOMES OFFICIAL PARTNER OF THE MIAMI OPEN PRESENTED BY ITAÚ AS EXCLUSIVE VITAMINS, MINERALS & SUPPLEMENTS PARTNER ELEVATING PERFORMANCE AT ONE OF TENNIS' PREMIER GLOBAL STAGES
data.description: In Summerville, South Carolina on March 12, 2026, Thorne, a top provider of evidence-based health and wellness products, revealed a fresh long-term agreement with the Miami Open, establishing themselves as the exclusive partner for Vitamins, Minerals, and Supplements for the tournament. This collaboration underscores Thorne's commitment to supporting overall well-being through science-backed solutions.

data.title: AI Infrastructure Expansion Drives Data Center IT Component Market Growth, According to Dell'Oro Group
data.description: Expansion in 2026 is anticipated to be fueled by Blackwell Ramp, Custom Accelerators, and high demand for components. A report from Dell'Oro Group, a reliable market information provider in telecommunications and security, revealed these drivers. The report was published on March 12, 2026 from Redwood City, California.
